Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-04 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptionally strong momentum performers at the top of the ranking. EACO leads with a composite score of 92.7 (rank 1), displaying extraordinary 1-year returns of 165% while maintaining pristine technical positioning above all four major moving averages and outperforming SPY by 138% over the same period. WTTR follows closely with similar structural strength—125% annual returns, all SMA gates passed, and consistent ratio progression across timeframes (4 out of 5 ratio passes)—though it lags EACO's 1-day pop of 4.76% and shows slightly lower long-term outperformance versus broad indexes. Both tickers demonstrate clean momentum signals and resilience on down SPY days (bad_spy_scores above 2.0), suggesting their gains are driven by fundamental momentum rather than broad market tailwinds. The ratio consistency and barrier-passing patterns indicate these are not flash moves but sustained uptrends, though the extreme returns—particularly EACO's 165% annual gain—warrant scrutiny into underlying catalysts and sustainability.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
